messages.text: Namaste! I am Acharya Rahul. I welcome you to this sacred space of Vedic wisdom.  To begin our session with precision, please share your Name, Date of Birth, Place, and Time.
I am Acharya Rahul, your Vedic guide. Based on your chart, I see great potential for growth.
